allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/check/email -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"body\\":\\"Hi please click this link\\"}" -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/check/email -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"body\\":\\"click here to verify your account\\"}" -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/check/url -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Origin: http://127.0.0.1:5173" -d "{\\"url\\":\\"https://www.google.com/\\"}" -w "\\nurl-check HTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "OPTIONS HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/check/url -H "Origin: http://127.0.0.1:5173" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type")
Bash(curl -s -v -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/check/url -H "Origin: http://127.0.0.1:5173" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/vt.json'\)\); [print\(r\) for r in d['signals'][3]['reasons']]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/vt.json'\)\); [print\(r\) for r in d['signals'][3]['reasons']]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/vt.json'\)\); [print\(r\) for r in next\(s for s in d['signals'] if s['source']=='virustotal'\)['reasons']]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/ea.json'\)\); print\('verdict:', d['verdict'], '| score:', d['score']\); [print\(' -', r\) for r in d['reasons'][:10]]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/ea.json'\)\); print\('verdict:', d['verdict'], '| score:', d['score']\); [print\(' -', r\) for r in d['reasons'][:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/ea.json'\)\); print\('verdict:', d.get\('verdict'\), '| score:', d.get\('score'\)\); [print\(' -', r\) for r in d.get\('reasons', []\)[:10]]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/out.json'\)\); print\('verdict:', d['verdict'], 'score:', d['score']\); [print\(' -', r\) for r in d['reasons'][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/out.json'\)\); print\('original:', d.get\('original_url'\)\); print\('expanded:', d.get\('expanded_url'\)\); print\('verdict:', d['verdict'], 'score:', d['score']\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/out.json'\)\); [print\(s['source'], '|', s.get\('available'\), '|', s.get\('reasons'\)[:2]\) for s in d['signals']]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/out.json'\)\); print\('original:', d.get\('original_url'\)\); print\('expanded:', d.get\('expanded_url'\)\); print\('verdict:', d['verdict'], 'score:', d['score']\); print\('---shortener signal---'\); s = next\(x for x in d['signals'] if x['source']=='shortener'\); [print\(' -', r\) for r in s['reasons']]")
